title: CWTR: Self-Trained, Map-Free AR Return Navigation — Code & Field Data
description: Reproducibility package for the IEEE Access manuscript 'Self-Trained, Map-Free AR Return Navigation with Confidence-Weighted Trajectory Reconstruction'. Contains the seeded simulation harness, component-evaluation and figure-generation scripts, ground-truthed real-trace analysis (Campaign A, N=8), the June 2026 high-multipath field campaign GPS recordings (Haram district, Madinah, and UPM campus; N=55 analysed), and Campaign B on-device end-point accuracy measurements. Every numerical value, table, and data-driven figure in the paper is reproduced by these scripts from a single fixed seed.
